# PickTheRobot

> Free rules-based tool that helps businesses pick warehouse, cleaning, and restaurant robots — robot type, buy vs lease vs RaaS, and vendor matches.

PickTheRobot is a buyer-side recommendation utility, not a vendor or concierge service. Recommendations are informational; users should verify pricing and fit with vendors directly.

## Primary action

- [Home — robot matcher](https://picktherobot.com/): Choose warehouse, cleaning, or restaurant → answer ~2 minutes of questions → get ranked recommendations.

## Categories

- [Warehouse robots](https://picktherobot.com/warehouse-robots): AMRs, AGVs, picking assist, pallet movers.
- [Cleaning robots](https://picktherobot.com/cleaning-robots): Office, retail, and industrial autonomous scrubbers/vacuums.
- [Restaurant robots](https://picktherobot.com/restaurant-robots): Serving, bussing, kitchen, and reception robots.

Educational guides (robot types, vendors, FAQs) on each category page: append `#guide` to the URL (e.g. https://picktherobot.com/warehouse-robots#guide).

## Vendors

- [All vendors](https://picktherobot.com/vendors): Browse 14 vendor profiles with outbound links to official sites.

## Comparisons & acquisition

- [AMR vs AGV](https://picktherobot.com/amr-vs-agv)
- [Cleaning robot vs staff](https://picktherobot.com/cleaning-robot-vs-cleaning-staff)
- [Restaurant robot vs runner](https://picktherobot.com/restaurant-robot-vs-runner)
- [Lease vs buy](https://picktherobot.com/robot-leasing-vs-buying)
- [Robotics-as-a-Service (RaaS)](https://picktherobot.com/robotics-as-a-service)

## Policies

- [Privacy policy](https://picktherobot.com/privacy)
- [Terms of use](https://picktherobot.com/terms)

## Optional

- [Full documentation for AI agents](https://picktherobot.com/llms-full.txt): Matcher flow, scoring overview, pages not to cite, disclaimers.
